# graphi — evidence index & gate dashboard

<!-- GENERATED FILE — do not edit by hand.
     Source of truth: docs/rc/evidence-index.yaml
     Regenerate:      go run ./cmd/evidence -generate
     Honesty check:   go run ./cmd/evidence -check
                      (a PASS row must carry an Evidence URI AND a SHA/Digest;
                       a gate with no explicit status defaults to UNKNOWN). -->

One row per gate, drawn from the execution plan ([`docs/plan/2026-07-graphi-9of10-execution-plan.md`](../plan/2026-07-graphi-9of10-execution-plan.md), §6 WP0–WP10 and the §5 milestone exit gates). The columns are the plan §7 dashboard columns.

**The rule this instrument enforces (plan §6 WP0):** every 9/10 claim must trace to a versioned raw artifact — *kein manuell gepflegtes „grün“ ohne Beleg*. A row may read **PASS** only if it carries both an Evidence URI and a SHA/Digest; `go run ./cmd/evidence -check` fails otherwise. A gate with no proven evidence reads **UNKNOWN**, and per plan §2.4 **UNKNOWN counts as not passed** — never blank, never omitted, never inferred from a green CI job. Most rows are UNKNOWN today, and that is the point: the gap is the artifact.

**Candidate** — cited from [`docs/decisions/2026-07-m0-candidate-freeze.md`](../decisions/2026-07-m0-candidate-freeze.md) (SW-116):

- Candidate SHA: `4e72637d3c2c0dc7d32142a590d46c0c62c10733`
- Published release digest: **UNKNOWN** — no published release, tag or attestation is bound to the candidate (SW-116). UNKNOWN counts as not passed (plan §2.4); do not borrow an adjacent commit's digest.

**Status legend:** ✅ PASS · ❌ FAIL · ❔ UNKNOWN. A blank cell (—) means the plan names no value for that column.

| Gate | Threshold | Current | PASS/FAIL/UNKNOWN | Evidence URI | SHA/Digest | Owner | Next action | Due date |

| **WP3** — Gold corpus & accuracy scoring (plan §6 WP3) | Symbol P≥98% / R≥95%; Edge P≥95% / R≥90%; Source-Anchor P≥99%; correct abstention ≥95%; high-confidence false statements ≤1%; ≥90/100 sealed tasks pass; Kappa ≥0.85. | UNKNOWN — ontology not frozen; gold corpus not built; scorers not run. | ❔ UNKNOWN | — | — | EVAL | Freeze the ontology, build the gold corpus, version the thresholds, then score. | W2–10 |
| **WP4** — Measured accuracy & performance fixes (plan §6 WP4) | Cold index p50 ≤90s / p95 ≤120s; peak RSS ≤2GB; DB ≤300MB; progress-stall p95 ≤2s; warm search p95 ≤100ms; caller/callee/impact p95 ≤200ms; agent context p95 ≤500ms; freshness p95 ≤2s; full/incremental parity 100% — over two consecutive full runs. | UNKNOWN — no measured performance baseline exists (blocked on WP2). | ❔ UNKNOWN | — | — | ENG | Establish the WP2 baseline, then drive fixes test-first against these KPIs. | W5–12 |
